input.signal_brief: $14M funding in February 2026; Python roles increased from 2 to 7 in 60 days.

candidate_output.subject: Request: 15 minutes on your Python hiring
candidate_output.body: Hi Maya, I saw your $14M funding in February 2026 and Python roles increasing from 2 to 7. We can provide managed Python and Data capacity with overlap. Would 15 minutes next week be useful? Best, Yabi

input.signal_brief: Two open data engineer roles in March 2026; signal confidence low.

candidate_output.subject: Question: are your data hires keeping pace?
candidate_output.body: Hi Tom, I noticed two open data engineer roles in March 2026. I cannot tell whether demand is fully covered. If useful, we can share options for managed data support. Would 15 minutes help? Best, Yabi

input.signal_brief: New CTO announcement in April 2026; vendor reassessment expected in first 90 days.

candidate_output.subject: Resource: vendor model brief for your first 90 days
candidate_output.body: Hi Priya, I saw the new CTO announcement in April 2026. Teams often reassess vendor mix in the first 90 days. I can share a one-page brief on trade-offs and where each model fails. Want me to send it? Best, Yabi
